title: Listening - Part 3
description: For each question, write the correct answer in the gap. Write one or two words or a number or a date or a time.
instructions: You will hear one person giving information. For questions 14–19, write the correct answer in the gap.
context: You will hear a theatre organiser giving information about a community theatre workshop.
audio_script: Speaker: Good morning, everyone. I'm pleased so many of you have come to the information meeting for our community theatre workshop. The workshop is for people who enjoy acting but have not had much experience, so please don't worry if you have never been on a stage before. We meet every Wednesday evening at the arts centre, but not in the main hall. Please go through the side door and meet us in the [14]small studio[/14] at the back of the building. The first session is mainly about moving and using your voice, so you don't need a costume or any special clothes. However, please bring [15]comfortable shoes[/15], because we will be standing and moving around quite a lot. There is also an extra class on Saturday morning for anyone who wants more practice. That class begins at [16]ten fifteen[/16] and finishes before lunch. This year we are going to prepare a short play called [17]The Garden[/17]. It's funny, easy to understand, and has parts for everyone. You will get a printed copy at the second meeting. At the end of the course, family and friends can come to watch a short performance. The date for that is [18]28 July[/18], so write it in your diary now. The normal price is twenty pounds, but if you are a student, you only pay [19]twelve[/19]. During the first few weeks, you will practise short scenes in pairs, so it is a good chance to meet other people. There will be a break in the middle of each session, and water is available near the door. You can pay online or at reception before the first class starts.

questions.explanation: The speaker says participants should meet in the small studio at the back of the building.
The speaker says people should bring comfortable shoes because they will be moving around.
The speaker says the Saturday class begins at ten fifteen.
The speaker says the group will prepare a short play called The Garden.
The speaker gives 28 July as the date of the short performance.
The speaker says students only pay twelve pounds.
